name: GLOBAL_TREND_BY_YEAR
description: Return yearly patent counts across the entire knowledge graph.
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
RETURN y.year AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY year
LIMIT 50;

result_schema.patent_count: Number of patents published in the year

examples: Show the overall yearly patent trend.
How many patents were published each year?
